refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: ref = imref2d(imageSize); ref = imref2d(imageSize, xWorldLimits, yWorldLimits)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Creates a Scilab structure containing image size, world limits, and pixel extents for registration and geometric workflows.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: official OpenCV documentation. Example 1 is an adapted OpenCV workflow; Example 2 is an independent IPCV workflow.
